---
title: "Homework8"
author: "Angela McMahon"
date: "3/25/2026"
output: 
  html_document:
  code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#remove warnings at END
library(tidyverse)
library(Lock5Data)
library(knitr)
data("StudentSurvey")
```


```{r}
StudentSurvey%>%
  select("Sex", "Weight", "Height") %>% 
  mutate(BMI = 701*(Weight/(Height^2)))%>%
  head(n=6)%>%
  kable()
  
```
